summary: The opencode package is a 506-file TypeScript codebase running on Bun with Effect v4 as the architectural backbone. It has undergone a massive SQLite→PostgreSQL migration and integrated DuckDB as an analytics backend. The codebase is fully Effect-native: all services are Context.Services composed via Layer. The tool subsystem (100 files) and session subsystem (24 files) form the tightest coupling. 11 subsystems have zero test coverage.

entry_points.primary: bin/opencode (Node.js shell launcher → spawns native binary from node_modules)
entry_points.source_entry: src/node.ts — re-exports: Config, Server, bootstrap, Database, applyMigrations
entry_points.deleted: src/index.ts — referenced in package.json scripts but deleted during recent refactor

frameworks.ai_sdk: Vercel AI SDK v4 with 19 provider packages

runtime.role: Shared platform: filesystem, logging, schema, service-use, global, installation
SDK v2 types for ACP + plugin integration

runtime.note: Not imported in src/ — consumed at build/bundle layer

tool.role: Agent tools: read, write, edit, grep, task, delegate, shell, git, plan, etc.
tool.registry: src/tool/registry.ts — ToolRegistry.Service aggregates all built-in tools
tool.smell: Directory bloat: 100 files, many thin wrappers. Potential consolidation target.

session.role: Session lifecycle: messages, compaction, prompts, LLM routing, processors
session.coupling: Heaviest cross-cutting consumer: imported by 79 other modules. Tight bidirectional coupling with tool/
session.migration_debt: 15+ TODO(v2) dual-write comments in processor.ts, prompt.ts

server.role: HTTP API server: Effect/unstable/http, HttpApiApp, WebSocket tracking, OpenAPI, mDNS
server.coupling: Imports from 13 subsystems — potential God object; orchestrates session, storage, tool, agent, permission

storage.role: Database layer: PostgreSQL (primary via #db), DuckDB (analytics via #db-duckdb)

agent.role: Agent lifecycle: models, prompts, authority, subagent permissions

config.role: Configuration: opencode.json parsing, providers, permissions, LSP, MCP, server config

context.role: Context assembly: packet construction, file memory, DuckDB ranking, workers

cli.role: CLI bootstrap, effect command wrappers, error formatting, UI helpers

campaign.role: Multi-agent orchestration: role contracts, state machines, binders, auditors
campaign.test_coverage: ZERO test files (1 non-test helper, 0 actual tests)

control-plane.role: Workspace management, adapters, debug workspace plugin

lifecycle.role: Session lifecycle: builtins, definitions, engine, loop, gates

plugin.role: Plugin system: OpenAI, Azure, Cloudflare, DigitalOcean, xAI, GitHub Copilot

patterns: Direct drizzle-orm eq/and/gte queries in session/session.ts

config_loading.canonical: loadConfig Effect.fnUntraced in config/config.ts:416 — reads opencode.json{c}
config_loading.merge: mergeDeep from remeda for multi-source config merging

tightest_bidirectional: session → storage (22 imports — heavy DB coupling)

circular_dependency_risks.detail: session imports ToolRegistry, ShellID, Truncate; tool imports Session, MessageV2, Todo, Instruction
storage/adapter imports server/health; server imports storage schemas

dependency_graph.singleton_services: All services are Effect Context.Services — no static mutable singletons

test_infrastructure.preload: test/preload.ts — isolates XDG dirs, clears 20+ auth env vars, sets OPENCODE_DB=:memory:, forces OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL=true
test_infrastructure.teardown: afterAll: Database.close(), retry rm up to 30x with 100ms backoff (handles Windows EBUSY)

test_patterns.effect_tests: test/lib/effect.ts wraps bun:test with Layer.buildWithMemoMap + scoped effects. Fake layers in test/fake/ replace mocks.
test_patterns.pure_tests: Plain bun:test for CLI/TUI pure functions (formatters, parsers, diff logic)
test_patterns.no_mock_framework: Effect Layer system provides DI — no jest.mock or mock.module

fixtures.fake_services: test/fake/ — account.ts, auth.ts, npm.ts, provider.ts, skill.ts

integration_tests: test/server/httpapi-exercise/ — 10-file DSL harness for HTTP API

code_smells.large_files: 33 files > 500 lines. Top: lsp/server.ts (2064), acp/agent.ts (1966), provider/provider.ts (1915)

migration_debt.description: 15+ TODO(v2) dual-write comments in session/processor.ts, session/prompt.ts. event-v2-bridge.ts bridges old/new event systems. Active migration in progress.

code_smells.tool_directory_bloat: 100 files in src/tool/. Many thin Tool.define() wrappers. Consolidation target.
code_smells.config_god_file: src/config/config.ts at 928 lines — config loading, merging, layer construction all in one file
code_smells.session_god_file: src/session/session.ts at 1072 lines — session CRUD, fromRow/toRow, plan logic all in one file
code_smells.server_wide_coupling: server/ imports from 13 subsystems — high fan-out, fragile to changes in any subsystem
code_smells.todo_count: 30 TODO/FIXME/HACK comments. Notable: 'TODO: fix this stupid inefficient dogshit function' (provider/transform.ts:62), 'TODO: remove this hack' (tool/tool.ts:14)
code_smells.deleted_referenced_file: src/index.ts referenced in package.json dev script but file was deleted

git_history.recent_activity: Heavy refactoring: 665 files changed, 35K insertions, 86K deletions in last 10 commits
major_changes: 40+ tools converted from plugin tools to built-in Effect tools
Desktop app initialization and runtime plumbing refactors
git_history.author: Single primary human author (Julian Torres) across all visible commits

hardening_opportunities.detail: context (15 files), campaign (16 files), event (9 files), lifecycle (6 files) have zero tests
session↔tool bidirectional coupling should be resolved via interface extraction or dependency inversion
lsp/server.ts (2064), acp/agent.ts (1966), provider/provider.ts (1915) should be decomposed
15+ TODO(v2) dual-write comments and event-v2-bridge indicate active migration — complete and remove bridge code
100 files in tool/ with many thin wrappers. Group by category or use a registry-driven pattern.
package.json:dev references src/index.ts which was deleted — script is broken
